title: Errata register — Sixth Buddhist Council Tipiṭaka
principle: Errata are recorded as an overlay: the printed reading is preserved verbatim; suggested emendations are marked as candidates pending scholarly confirmation. The base text is never silently altered.
method: corpus-wide orthographic scan (characters outside the Pāḷi alphabet), adjudicated against rendered pages
